textByHashes.c0ed1eb1a2ca989cfe0b62b1b478821a04e3efaf: Smoke dungeon. Got smoke devils in it. For killing.
textByHashes.f2e270258be8076dc8dfe89ab8325cbedf405bcc: My niece Nieve *hack hack* is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I look after this cave for people on assignments like that.
textByHashes.6404f8e1ce81ba590ff4b05a3923c343a724434e: My nephew Steve *hack hack* is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I look after this cave for people on assignments like that.
textByHashes.7674743f4b833a91e2a18a8542953e4fb4fd3959: Of course I'm alright. I'm fed up with you young folk asking *cough cough* if I'm alright just because I like a bit of smoke in my tubes.
textByHashes.df0e117c1333ac4546ecb40f2e4f679dbf6fd67b: Don't you come lecturing me on air quality, young man - I've breathed smoke all my life, man and boy and and there's no scientific evidence that it's harmful.
textByHashes.5589e30fa1e9eaddaf34c8f89d726b6847a8b897: Hey, you don't wanna go in there without some kind of protection from the smoke. Your lungs aren't as tough as mine.
